documentation.description:
Common definitions for STM32G4xx family [RM0440]

RCC: Reset and clock control

simple_types.name: RCC_CFGR_HPRE_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCC_CFGR_HPRE_Field is
  (SYSCLK_1,
   Reserved_0001,
   Reserved_0010,
   Reserved_0011,
   Reserved_0100,
   Reserved_0101,
   Reserved_0110,
   Reserved_0111,
   …,
   SYSCLK_512) with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: RCC_CFGR_MCOPRE_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCC_CFGR_MCOPRE_Field is
  (MCO_1,
   MCO_2,
   MCO_4,
   MCO_8,
   MCO_16,
   Reserved_101,
   Reserved_110,
   Reserved_111) with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: RCC_CFGR_MCOSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCC_CFGR_MCOSEL_Field is
  (Disabled,
   SYSCLK,
   Reserved_0010,
   HSI16,
   HSE,
   PLL,
   LSI,
   LSE,
   HSI48) with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: RCC_CFGR_PPRE1_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCC_CFGR_PPRE1_Field is
  (HCLK_1,
   Reserved_001,
   Reserved_010,
   Reserved_011,
   HCLK_2,
   HCLK_4,
   HCLK_8,
   HCLK_16) with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: RCC_CFGR_PPRE2_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCC_CFGR_PPRE2_Field is
  (HCLK_1,
   Reserved_001,
   Reserved_010,
   Reserved_011,
   HCLK_2,
   HCLK_4,
   HCLK_8,
   HCLK_16) with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: RCC_CFGR_SW_Field
simple_types.code: type RCC_CFGR_SW_Field is (Reserved_00, HSI16, HSE, PLL);

simple_types.name: RCC_PLLCFGR_PLLP_Field
simple_types.code: type RCC_PLLCFGR_PLLP_Field is (PLLP_7, PLLP_17) with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: RCC_PLLCFGR_PLLQ_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCC_PLLCFGR_PLLQ_Field is (PLLQ_2, PLLQ_4, PLLQ_6, PLLQ_8)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: RCC_PLLCFGR_PLLR_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCC_PLLCFGR_PLLR_Field is (PLLR_2, PLLR_4, PLLR_6, PLLR_8)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: RCC_PLLCFGR_PLLSRC_Field
simple_types.code:
type RCC_PLLCFGR_PLLSRC_Field is (No, Reserved_01, HSI16, HSE)
  with Size => 2;

record_types.name: RCC_AHB1ENR_Register
RCC_AHB2ENR_Register
RCC_AHB3ENR_Register
RCC_APB1ENR1_Register
RCC_APB1ENR2_Register
RCC_APB2ENR_Register

RCC_CR_Register

documentation.description:
FSF GCC 14 is unable to evaluate register's address at compile time
and it use objects for constants allocated in RAM to store registers'
addresses. These constants should be initialized at elaboration, but
elaboration is disabled for this compilation unit. Named constants
for addresses and offsets are used to workaround this issue.
